title: Air Combo
body:
This mod adds a form of air movement to enhance the **_fierce_** combat experience that Minecraft provides!


It adds a simple _boost upward_ whenever you **crit** along with _air movements_ in 4 directions, front, back, left and right

![critboost](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/74ef7b6679daa5d3dd36d26900237837f8f2799c.gif)

These movements are performed by **shifting** and holding down the _movement keys WASD_ after **critting** an enemy (I will try to add a way that doesn't use keybinds as it would be smoother without them) 

![flipfront](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85d17cdfba0942ff3177292090e400bb907c53ac.gif)![sideboost](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b04b0765375f5bb82b72ce4e39518c479d3b001f.gif)

In addition, there is an additional movement option that consists of a _second upward boost_, that is triggered by simply **shifting** after **critting** an enemy

![handstandlaunch](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4dbcdb405b5072bf494da39a0e9a3430c2677638.gif)

A new enemy has been added that will drop a book to increase your aerial combo capabilities

 

 

I also added config and commands to set which movement options you have (it is based on numbers: 1 disables them, 2 enables the first crit mechanic, 3 enables the backward boost, 4 enables the side boosts, 5 enables the front boost and 6 enables the upward boost

 

 

 

Animations are not synced in multiplayer

 

 

To do:

Add configurable Everything

Add particles and sounds

Add animation syncing

Add double boost moves(will take a while)

 

 

 

_Also, I don't know if I have to say this but you are allowed to use this mod in any modpack you like_

I'm lazy so the "curated" mod page for now is here

[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/air-combo](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/air-combo)
